title: Inbound Update Note (post edit)
description: Handle inbound Update{Note} activities to update a cached remote post. Update content_html, spoiler_text, sensitive in the remote_posts row. Trigger a status.update streaming event for affected local actors.
design: Find remote_posts row by ap_uri from the Note's id field. Update content_html (re-sanitize with ammonia), spoiler_text, sensitive. Emit streaming event.
acceptance_criteria: Edited remote post shows updated content; streaming clients receive status.update event; Update for unknown post is silently ignored
